check_content_excerpt:
Verify the audit records, at a minimum, are off-loaded for interconnected systems in real time and off-loaded for stand-alone or nondomain-joined systems weekly. 

If they are not, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the system to, at a minimum, off-load audit records of interconnected systems in real time and off-load stand-alone or nondomain-joined systems weekly.
title: Windows Server 2025 must, at a minimum, off-load audit records of interconnected systems in real time and off-load stand-alone or nondomain-joined systems weekly.
